overview.name: Overview
overview.subtitle: Configuration status & getting started
overview.intro: Translation services turn subtitles into your target language. Free translation works out of the box; AI translation is higher quality with terminology and context support, but needs an API key. Either one is enough to use in tasks.
overview.freeDesc: Aggregated free sources — no sign-up or keys, fine for everyday subtitles.
overview.aiDesc: LLM translation: accurate, prompt-tunable, billed by the provider.
overview.mtDesc: Classic MT APIs: stable and fast, pay-as-you-go, good for bulk.
overview.pathFreeDesc: "Auto free translation" aggregates several free sources, ready out of the box
overview.pathAiDesc: Add a DeepSeek or Gemini API key for noticeably better quality
overview.pathCustomDesc: Self-hosted relays or other compatible endpoints, pinned to the top once added

addCustomProviderHint: OpenAI-compatible API; shown at the top once added.
addCustomProviderDesc: Create a custom translation provider with your preferred API endpoint and model.
batchSizeBaiduTips: Batch size is the number of sentences translated at a time. If the number is too large, it may cause translation failure. The maximum value is 18.
batchSizeVolcTips: Batch size is the number of sentences translated at a time. If the number is too large, it may cause translation failure. The maximum value is 16.
batchSizeAzureTips: Batch size is the number of sentences translated at a time. If the number is too large, it may cause translation failure. The maximum value is 1000.
batchSizeAliyunTips: Batch size is the number of sentences translated at a time. If the number is too large, it may cause translation failure. Recommended value is 15.
endpointAliyunTips: Aliyun machine translation service domain, default is mt.aliyuncs.com, usually no need to modify.
baiduApiKeyTips: Baidu Translate APP ID and Secret Key — register at the Baidu Translate Open Platform and create an app.
aliyunApiKeyTips: Aliyun AccessKey — create in RAM Access Control; enable machine translation at the MT Console.
volcApiKeyTips: Volcano Engine AccessKey — create in Key Management; enable translation at the MT Console.
tencentApiKeyTips: Tencent Cloud SecretId / SecretKey — create in API Key Management; machine translation service must be enabled first.
xunfeiApiKeyTips: iFlytek APPID / APIKey / APISecret — create a machine translation app at the iFlytek Open Platform.
azureApiKeyTips: Azure Translator API Key and Region — create a resource at Azure Translator.
niutransApiKeyTips: NiuTrans API-KEY, available in the personal center of the NiuTrans open platform console.
batchSizeNiutransTips: NiuTrans text API translates one segment per request. Set to 1 to keep translations aligned with the timeline.
regionTencentTips: Tencent Cloud machine translation region, default is ap-guangzhou, usually no need to modify.
batchSizeTencentTips: Tencent Cloud text translation translates one segment per request. Set to 1 to keep translations aligned with the timeline. Use request interval to handle QPS limits.
batchSizeXunfeiTips: iFlytek machine translation translates one segment per request. Set to 1 to keep translations aligned with the timeline.
systemPromptTips:
System prompt, supports variables:
${sourceLanguage} Source language
${targetLanguage} Target language
${content} Source subtitle
${glossary} Global terms matched in this batch
userPromptTips:
User prompt, supports variables:
${sourceLanguage} Source language
${targetLanguage} Target language
${content} Source subtitle
autoDetectTrying: Current structured output setting failed, trying {{mode}}…
autoDetectSwitched: Structured Output auto-switched to {{mode}} and saved
autoDetectAllFailed: All structured output modes were tried without success — check your API key, base URL and model name
ollamaApiUrlTips: Local Ollama API address — use the chat endpoint, usually http://localhost:11434/api/chat. Install Ollama from the Ollama website.
deeplxApiUrlTips: DeepLX runs as a separate local service — set the endpoint after install. See the DeepLX GitHub project for setup; default URL is http://localhost:1188/translate
DeerApiUrlTips: Get API keys with lightning-fast speeds at incredibly low prices. Easy top-up via Alipay/WeChat Pay. Visit DeerAPI to apply!
deerApiKeyTips: DeerAPI API Key — register and top up at the DeerAPI console.
deepseekApiUrlTips: DeepSeek API URL, default https://api.deepseek.com/v1. Register at the DeepSeek Platform.
deepseekApiKeyTips: DeepSeek API Key — create one on the API Keys page.
azureOpenAiApiUrlTips: Azure OpenAI deployment endpoint — see placeholder for format. Create a resource in Azure AI Services.
azureOpenAiApiKeyTips: Azure OpenAI API Key — copy from the resource's Keys and Endpoint page.
geminiApiUrlTips: Gemini OpenAI-compatible endpoint — Google default URL, usually no change needed.
geminiApiKeyTips: Gemini API Key — create for free in Google AI Studio.
siliconflowApiUrlTips: SiliconFlow API URL, default https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1. Register at the SiliconFlow Cloud.
siliconflowApiKeyTips: SiliconFlow API Key — create in API Key Management.
qwenApiUrlTips: Qwen OpenAI-compatible endpoint — DashScope default URL, usually no change needed.
qwenApiKeyTips: DashScope API Key — get one from the Bailian Console.
openaiApiUrlTips: OpenAI-compatible API base URL, usually ending in /v1, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1. Do not paste a model detail page or /chat/completions endpoint — SmartSub appends the chat path automatically.
openaiModelNameTips: Enter the exact model id from your provider, e.g. hunyuan-3.0-preview. If the test fails with a response_format error, set Structured Output to Disabled.
openaiApiKeyTips: OpenAI API Key — create at the OpenAI Platform.
googleApiKeyTips: Google Cloud Translation API key — create in the Google Cloud Console and enable the Cloud Translation API
batchSizeGoogleTips: Google Translate batch size, recommended under 50 to avoid request limits
customParametersTip: Configure additional headers and body parameters for this provider
structuredOutputTips:
Select the structured output type supported by your AI service provider:
• Disabled - No structured output, model returns content freely
• JSON Object - Standard JSON object format (suitable for DeepSeek, Qwen, etc.)
• JSON Schema - Strict JSON schema validation (suitable for OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, etc.; locks the translation count at the decoding level — strongly recommended for large batches)

Different AI providers support different structured output types. Selecting the wrong type may cause translation failures.
echoAnchoringTips: When enabled, the model returns both the source echo and the translation for every subtitle entry. The app uses the echo to detect and repair misalignment caused by merged neighbouring subtitles, keeping translations aligned with the timeline. Roughly doubles output token usage; when disabled, only count and empty-value checks apply.
echoPromptOutdatedHint: Your custom prompt does not include the src/tr echo protocol. Translation still works, but misalignment detection is unavailable. Consider updating it based on the default prompt, or restoring the default.
doubaoApiKeyTips: Doubao Translation API Key, can be obtained from Volcano Ark Console
doubaoModelNameTips: Doubao translation model name, default is doubao-seed-translation-250915, usually no need to modify
batchSizeDoubaoTips: Doubao translation batch size, due to API limits, recommended to set to 1
requestIntervalTip: Wait time between consecutive requests (in seconds), useful for APIs with rate limits. Set to 0 for no delay. Example: for 10 requests/minute limit, set to 6.
fallbackChainTips: Ordered fallback chain of free sources. Click the buttons below to add a source, and use the up/down arrows to set priority. Tried top to bottom; on failure or rate limiting it switches to the next source. deeplx is skipped automatically when no endpoint is configured.
windowMaxRequestsTips: Max number of requests allowed within a sliding 60-second window, to reduce the chance of IP-based rate limiting (429) by free endpoints. Set to 0 for no limit.
batchSizeAutoFreeTips: Subtitle lines per batch. Actual batching depends on the matched source (Bing supports batching, Google is per-line). Around 10 is recommended.
batchSizeBingFreeTips: Bing (Edge) free translation natively supports multiple texts per request. Around 10 is recommended.
batchSizeGoogleFreeTips: The Google free endpoint translates one line at a time; batch size only affects progress granularity. For large volumes, pair it with a request interval to avoid rate limiting.
batchSizeTip: Number of subtitle lines per translation batch — 5 to 20 is recommended
batchConcurrencyTip: Number of translation batches to run at the same time, capped at 10. Default 1 runs sequentially; higher values can improve speed but require provider quota and may trigger rate limits.
removeProviderConfirmDesc: After removal, the configuration (including the API key) for provider "{{name}}" will be deleted and you'll need to add it again.
selectProviderHint: Select a translation service from the list to configure

providerError.missingKeyOrSecret: Missing API key or secret — check your configuration
providerError.not_supported_language: This language pair is not supported
providerError.unauthorized: Authentication failed — check your API key
providerError.api_key_not_valid: Invalid API key — please enter a valid key
